body: The most selfless people on earth are not saints — they are people who wanted desperately to stop caring and discovered, to their quiet devastation, that they simply could not.
title: I.

body: Your alter ego doesn't fear your success. It fears you noticing how long it has been signing your name on things it built from your wreckage.
title: II.

body: Beauty and disgust were never opposites in a human being — they are the same root, grown in two directions, and the ones who pretend otherwise have simply stopped looking closely at themselves.
title: III.

body: The middle is not a safe place to stand. It is a place where you feel everything twice — once when it happens, and once when you realize no one around you felt it at all.
title: IV.

body: A true lover is not someone who gives without limit. They are someone who gives with full knowledge of the cost, receives almost nothing in return, and finds — to their own bewilderment — that they would do it again.
title: V.
